expectations.text: Template filename uses hyphens not underscores: e.g., featured-resources-list.html.twig (Drupal convention maps underscores in hook name to hyphens in filename -- wrong naming means template is silently never found and output falls back to empty)
expectations.evidence: Template file exists at /tmp/d10-theming-with/web/modules/custom/featured_resources/templates/featured-resources.html.twig — hook name 'featured_resources' correctly maps to hyphenated filename 'featured-resources.html.twig'

expectations.text: hook_theme() declares ALL template variables with default values in the 'variables' key (undeclared variables are undefined in Twig causing silent rendering failures -- the variables array IS the template's API contract)
expectations.evidence: featured_resources.module lines 14-17: 'variables' => ['items' => [], 'attributes' => []] — both variables used in the template (items and attributes) are declared with default values

expectations.text: Render array uses #theme key referencing the hook_theme entry name (NOT building raw HTML strings with Markup::create() or concatenating HTML into #markup -- raw HTML bypasses theme overrides and security filtering)
expectations.evidence: FeaturedResourcesController.php line 39: '#theme' => 'featured_resources' — no Markup::create(), no #markup with concatenated HTML found anywhere in the module

expectations.text: CSS/JS attached via #attached['library'] referencing module_name/library_name format (NOT inline <script>/<style> tags, NOT drupal_add_css() which was removed in D8)
featured_resources.libraries.yml file exists defining the CSS library with a css key containing at least one file path
expectations.evidence: featured_resources.libraries.yml lines 1-5: defines 'featured_resources_list' library with css: > component: > css/featured-resources.css: {}

expectations.text: Template file exists in templates/ subdirectory of the module (correct standard location for module templates)
The module enables successfully: ddev drush en featured_resources returns exit code 0
expectations.evidence: Command output: '[notice] Already installed: featured_resources', EXIT:0

expectations.text: Log in as admin via drush uli, navigate to the module's page route (e.g., /featured-resources) -- verify the themed template renders visible output (not raw HTML, not PHP errors, not a blank page) (via eval-browser)
expectations.evidence: eval-browser report: passed=true, evidence='HTTP 200. Themed output with links. No PHP errors.'

expectations.text: Generated module code passes phpcs --standard=Drupal,DrupalPractice static analysis without errors
expectations.evidence: phpcs result provided: 0 errors, 0 warnings. PASSES.
